gaps.description: All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented matching ARCHITECTURE.md — M101 engine registry unification complete, voice adapter API signatures documented
M103 basic stability features (OpenAI error format with code field, audio format validation, /api/health endpoint) are implemented in api.js and middleware.js

GET /api/health response structure mismatch: ARCHITECTURE.md specifies { status, components: { ollama, stt, tts } } but implementation returns { status, uptime, ollama, stt, tts, responseTime } — components are flat at top level instead of nested under 'components' key

ARCHITECTURE.md Known Limitations section (items 4 and 5) still lists audio format validation as missing and error code field as incomplete, but both are now implemented — doc is stale in the limitations section

Architecture diagram shows adapters at 'adapters/sense.js' and 'adapters/voice/*' but actual path is 'runtime/adapters/sense.js' and 'runtime/adapters/voice/*' — diagram labels are slightly inaccurate
M103 expanded scope: src/engine/health.js (engine health check + auto-degradation) not implemented — file does not exist, not yet in ARCHITECTURE.md
M103 expanded scope: src/server/queue.js (request queue + concurrency control for local models) not implemented — file does not exist
M103 expanded scope: retry logic in engine/ollama.js and engine/cloud.js not implemented — no retry patterns found in either file
M103 expanded scope: auth middleware (AGENTIC_API_KEY bearer token) not implemented in middleware.js
M103 expanded scope: graceful shutdown (SIGINT/SIGTERM handling, drain connections) not implemented — no shutdown.js or equivalent
